title: Zero Vector — Assumption
description: Captures a project assumption: what you believe to be true, how confident you are, and how you plan to validate it.

assumption.description: The assumption stated clearly and specifically

confidence.description: How confident you are that this assumption is true

evidence.description: What evidence supports or contradicts this assumption

test_method.description: How you plan to validate or invalidate this assumption

result.description: Outcome of testing (filled in after validation)
